name: yarn_ball_coin
description: Wool Crush soft currency: one compact golden-yellow ball of yarn wound into a clean round coin-like silhouette, with three broad curved strand bands, a short tucked yarn tail, and a small warm-gold rim glow. It is unmistakably yarn, not a metal coin.
prompt_extra: single centered object; tactile plush wool with restrained fiber texture; readable at 48px; no star, letters, face, animal, needle, or loose clutter

variants.name: premium
variants.prompt_extra: deeper honey-gold yarn with one crisp top highlight
